PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 8; $attempt = 0; while\($attempt -lt 5\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 2; if\($r.StatusCode -eq 200\) { Write-Host "✓ Server ready"; break } } catch { } $attempt++; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2 }; if\($attempt -eq 5\) { Write-Host "⚠ Server startup timeout" })
